item.description: The Supreme Court has ruled to allow the Trump administration to end the Temporary Protected Status for thousands of immigrants from Haiti and Syria. NBC News' Gary Grumbach reports on the court's split among ideological lines and how the ruling impacts the administration's immigration policies.

media:content.media:title: Supreme Court allows Trump to end protected status for Haitian and Syrian immigrants
media:content.media:description: The Supreme Court has ruled to allow the Trump administration to end the Temporary Protected Status for thousands of immigrants from Haiti and Syria. NBC News' Gary Grumbach reports on the court's split among ideological lines and how the ruling impacts the administration's immigration policies.

item.title: Supreme Court allows Trump to end protected status for Haitian and Syrian immigrants

item.description: Ana Vanessa Herrero, reporting for NBC News in Venezuela, sheds light on the hundreds of people looking for loved ones who might be missing under the rubble after two major earthquakes hit near the country's capital on Wednesday.

media:content.media:title: NBC News reporter in Venezuela says people she knows might be missing under rubble
media:content.media:description: Ana Vanessa Herrero, reporting for NBC News in Venezuela, sheds light on the hundreds of people looking for loved ones who might be missing under the rubble after two major earthquakes hit near the country's capital on Wednesday.

item.title: NBC News reporter in Venezuela says people she knows might be missing under rubble

item.description: Luego de un tiro de esquina, Kevin Rodríguez cabecea para bajar el balón en el área y Gonzalo Plata con un puntapié arrebata el balón de las manos del portero alemán, para darle la ventaja a los ecuatorianos por 2-1.

media:content.media:title: Gonzalo Plata vence a Neuer y le da la ventaja a Ecuador
media:content.media:description: Luego de un tiro de esquina, Kevin Rodríguez cabecea para bajar el balón en el área y Gonzalo Plata con un puntapié arrebata el balón de las manos del portero alemán, para darle la ventaja a los ecuatorianos por 2-1.

item.title: Gonzalo Plata vence a Neuer y le da la ventaja a Ecuador

item.dc:creator: David K. Li
item.description: Alex Freeman, son of former Green Bay Packers wideout Antonio Freeman, has stepped up for the U.S. men’s national team in the World Cup. It’s no surprise to his father.

media:content.media:text: USA v Australia: Group D - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Alex Freeman the U.S.'s 2-0 victory over Australia in Seattle on Friday.

media:content.media:text: Receiver Antonio Freeman #86 of the Green Bay Packers
media:content.media:description: Alex Freeman the U.S.'s 2-0 victory over Australia in Seattle on Friday.

media:content.media:text: Alex Freeman #16 of the United States
media:content.media:description: Alex Freeman the U.S.'s 2-0 victory over Australia in Seattle on Friday.

item.title: Football vs. fútbol: Who is the best Freeman? Dad Antonio salutes son Alex

item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: George Weah won the Ballon d’Or in 1995 and is considered one of the best soccer players of his generation. Now, his son is carving his own path on the U.S. men’s national team.

media:content.media:text: United States Portraits - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

media:content.media:text: Timothy Weah of United States
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

media:content.media:text: George Weah holding the Ballon D'Or in 1995; Timothy Weah holding the Coppa Italia in 2024.
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

media:content.media:text: On-field action during World Cup Qatar 2022.
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

media:content.media:text: George Weah, President of Liberia
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

item.title: Out from his father’s shadow, Tim Weah is carving his own path with the U.S.

item.dc:creator: David Hickey
item.description: A Brazilian side that featured Neymar sealed the top spot in Group C with a 3-0 win over Scotland yesterday, while the co-hosts Canada progressed to the knockouts for the first time in its history

media:content.media:text: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Scotland's Tartan Army Gather for Brazil match
media:content.media:description: Scotland fans play bagpipes as Scotland's Tartan Army travel to Miami Stadium for the match between Scotland and Brazil on June 24.

media:content.media:text: Brazil's Vinicius Junior celebrates.
media:content.media:description: Scotland fans play bagpipes as Scotland's Tartan Army travel to Miami Stadium for the match between Scotland and Brazil on June 24.

media:content.media:text: Guillermo Ochoa #13 of Mexico is tossed into the air by his teammates after the team's 3-0 victory.
media:content.media:description: Scotland fans play bagpipes as Scotland's Tartan Army travel to Miami Stadium for the match between Scotland and Brazil on June 24.

media:content.media:text: Christian Pulisic.
media:content.media:description: Scotland fans play bagpipes as Scotland's Tartan Army travel to Miami Stadium for the match between Scotland and Brazil on June 24.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: Is the Tartan party over?

item.description: Virgil van Dijk peinó un tiro libre dentro del área y Brian Brobbey apareció para conectar una volea de derecha que terminó en el ángulo, ampliando la ventaja de Países Bajos ante Túnez.

media:content.media:title: ¡Brian Brobbey no perdona y aumenta la ventaja de Países Bajos!
media:content.media:description: Virgil van Dijk peinó un tiro libre dentro del área y Brian Brobbey apareció para conectar una volea de derecha que terminó en el ángulo, ampliando la ventaja de Países Bajos ante Túnez.

item.title: ¡Brian Brobbey no perdona y aumenta la ventaja de Países Bajos!

item.description: Un intento de despeje de Ellyes Skhiri terminó dentro de su propia portería tras la presión neerlandesa. El autogol le dio la ventaja a Países Bajos en los primeros minutos del duelo ante Túnez.

media:content.media:title: ¡Autogol tempranero! Países Bajos toma ventaja ante Túnez
media:content.media:description: Un intento de despeje de Ellyes Skhiri terminó dentro de su propia portería tras la presión neerlandesa. El autogol le dio la ventaja a Países Bajos en los primeros minutos del duelo ante Túnez.

item.title: ¡Autogol tempranero! Países Bajos toma ventaja ante Túnez

item.description: El exjugador de Ecuador agradece el esfuerzo de los jugadores de ‘La Tri’, especialmente al autor del segundo gol, Gonzalo Plata. Posicionados en tercer lugar, Valencia celebra que Ecuador sigue en el Mundial 2026.

media:content.media:title: La emoción de Antonio Valencia por la victoria de Ecuador ante Alemania | Pasión Mundial
media:content.media:description: El exjugador de Ecuador agradece el esfuerzo de los jugadores de ‘La Tri’, especialmente al autor del segundo gol, Gonzalo Plata. Posicionados en tercer lugar, Valencia celebra que Ecuador sigue en el Mundial 2026.

item.title: La emoción de Antonio Valencia por la victoria de Ecuador ante Alemania | Pasión Mundial

item.description: La Tri dio el golpe al vencer 2-1 a Alemania en la última jornada de la fase de grupos del Mundial 2026, logrando una victoria histórica frente a una de las grandes potencias, clasificándose a la siguiente ronda.

media:content.media:title: Batacazo mundialista: Ecuador derrota 2-1 a Alemania y se clasifica
media:content.media:description: La Tri dio el golpe al vencer 2-1 a Alemania en la última jornada de la fase de grupos del Mundial 2026, logrando una victoria histórica frente a una de las grandes potencias, clasificándose a la siguiente ronda.

item.title: Batacazo mundialista: Ecuador derrota 2-1 a Alemania y se clasifica

item.description: Con un doblete de Nicolas Pépé, el equipo africano aseguró su boleto a la siguiente fase de la Copa del Mundo 2026 tras finalizar como segundo del Grupo E. Disfruta los golazos imperdibles que definieron el encuentro.

media:content.media:title: Nicolas Pépé brilla con un doblete en la victoria de Costa de Marfil sobre Curazao.
media:content.media:description: Con un doblete de Nicolas Pépé, el equipo africano aseguró su boleto a la siguiente fase de la Copa del Mundo 2026 tras finalizar como segundo del Grupo E. Disfruta los golazos imperdibles que definieron el encuentro.

item.title: Nicolas Pépé brilla con un doblete en la victoria de Costa de Marfil sobre Curazao.

item.description: Valdano celebra la energía competitiva que Ecuador inyectó contra Alemania; sobre la selección mexicana, dice que ayer demostró calidad. El exjugador argentino confesa que Estados Unido es la selección que mayor impresión le ha causado.

media:content.media:title: Jorge Valdano aplaude la actuación de Ecuador, México y Estados Unidos | Pasión Mundial
media:content.media:description: Valdano celebra la energía competitiva que Ecuador inyectó contra Alemania; sobre la selección mexicana, dice que ayer demostró calidad. El exjugador argentino confesa que Estados Unido es la selección que mayor impresión le ha causado.

item.title: Jorge Valdano aplaude la actuación de Ecuador, México y Estados Unidos | Pasión Mundial

item.description: El defensor de la Selección de Ecuador destaca el gran partido de la Tri para conseguir la clasificación de forma agónica y la necesidad de demostrarle al pueblo ecuatoriano de lo que son capaces de hacer en el Mundial.

media:content.media:title: William Pacho: “No nos podíamos irnos así, merecíamos darle alegría al pueblo”
media:content.media:description: El defensor de la Selección de Ecuador destaca el gran partido de la Tri para conseguir la clasificación de forma agónica y la necesidad de demostrarle al pueblo ecuatoriano de lo que son capaces de hacer en el Mundial.

item.title: William Pacho: “No nos podíamos irnos así, merecíamos darle alegría al pueblo”

item.description: Jozy Altidore afirma que la selección estadounidense saldrá hoy a la cancha con ánimo y garra para conseguir los 9 puntos históricos y resalta la oportunidad del banquillo para destacar y dar descanso a los titulares.

media:content.media:title: Altidore: “El banquillo es importante para dejar claro que son parte del torneo” | Pasión Mundial
media:content.media:description: Jozy Altidore afirma que la selección estadounidense saldrá hoy a la cancha con ánimo y garra para conseguir los 9 puntos históricos y resalta la oportunidad del banquillo para destacar y dar descanso a los titulares.

item.title: Altidore: “El banquillo es importante para dejar claro que son parte del torneo” | Pasión Mundial

item.description: El capitán de Alemania aseguró que los ecuatorianos demostraron una mayor determinación durante el partido y que el resultado fue justo, apuntando que tienen muchos detalles para mejorar de cara a la ronda de 16vos.

media:content.media:title: “Fue una derrota merecida”: Joshua Kimmich tras caer ante Ecuador
media:content.media:description: El capitán de Alemania aseguró que los ecuatorianos demostraron una mayor determinación durante el partido y que el resultado fue justo, apuntando que tienen muchos detalles para mejorar de cara a la ronda de 16vos.

item.title: “Fue una derrota merecida”: Joshua Kimmich tras caer ante Ecuador

item.description: El defensa ecuatoriano habló luego de que Ecuador se convirtió en el tercer equipo de la CONMEBOL que logra superar a Alemania en una Copa del Mundo. Agradecido por todo el aliento que reciben de la afición.

media:content.media:title: La reacción de Piero Hincapié tras el histórico triunfo de Ecuador sobre Alemania en el Mundial
media:content.media:description: El defensa ecuatoriano habló luego de que Ecuador se convirtió en el tercer equipo de la CONMEBOL que logra superar a Alemania en una Copa del Mundo. Agradecido por todo el aliento que reciben de la afición.

item.title: La reacción de Piero Hincapié tras el histórico triunfo de Ecuador sobre Alemania en el Mundial

item.dc:creator: Natasha Korecki
Allan Smith
item.description: But some in the party cautioned against taking too many national lessons from the successes of New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s congressional slate.

media:content.media:text: NYC Votes In Lively Primaries, With Suburban Race Key To House
media:content.media:description: Zohran Mamdani, mayor of New York, campaigns with Brad Lander, former New York City comptroller and US Democratic House candidate for New York, and Illapa Sairitupac, Democratic New York State assembly candidate, not pictured, during a primary election in New York, US, on Tuesday, June 23, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Brad Lander,Zohran Mamdani
media:content.media:description: Democratic congressional candidate Brad Lander, center, arrives with New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani at an election night watch party Tuesday.

item.title: Democratic rift over the party’s future widens amid the left’s New York victories

item.description: In a major reversal, Senate Republicans refused to rein in President Donald Trump’s war powers, hours after he chastised members of his own party for going against him. Earlier in the day, the president refused to take part in a planned ceremony to sign a bill overwhelmingly passed by both parties aimed at making housing affordable, until, he says, the Senate passes the SAVE Act, which would require voters show proof of ID and citizenship documents to vote. NBC’s Kelly O’Donnell reports fo

media:content.media:title: Senate Reverses Course on War Powers After Visit From Trump
media:content.media:description: In a major reversal, Senate Republicans refused to rein in President Donald Trump’s war powers, hours after he chastised members of his own party for going against him. Earlier in the day, the president refused to take part in a planned ceremony to sign a bill overwhelmingly passed by both parties aimed at making housing affordable, until, he says, the Senate passes the SAVE Act, which would require voters show proof of ID and citizenship documents to vote. NBC’s Kelly O’Donnell reports for TODAY.

item.title: Senate Reverses Course on War Powers After Visit From Trump

item.dc:creator: Berkeley Lovelace Jr.
Jason Kane
Erin McLaughlin
item.description: TRICARE, the military’s healthcare program, limits coverage of applied behavior analysis, a type of therapy for people with autism. Kristi Cabiao is trying to get the policy changed.

media:content.media:text: The Cabiao family in March.
media:content.media:description: The Cabiao family. Logan, second from right, has a severe form of autism and is nonverbal.

media:content.media:text: Logan at the ABA center in 2023.
media:content.media:description: The Cabiao family. Logan, second from right, has a severe form of autism and is nonverbal.

media:content.media:text: Mario in the back of a C-130.
media:content.media:description: The Cabiao family. Logan, second from right, has a severe form of autism and is nonverbal.

item.title: This autism therapy is covered by many insurers. Why does the military restrict it?

item.dc:creator: Alicia Victoria Lozano
Madeline Morrison
item.description: LOS ANGELES — After two days of deliberations, a jury told the court that it was at an impasse and unable to reach a unanimous decision in the trial about the origin of the devastating January 2025 fires in Los Angeles

media:content.media:text: California Wildfires Palisades Investigation
media:content.media:description: A helicopter drops water as the Palisades Fire grows in the Pacific Palisades neighborhood of Los Angeles in January 2025.

item.title: Jury at an impasse in trial over deadly, destructive Palisades fire

item.dc:creator: Deanna Pai
item.description: Amazon Prime Day Lightning Deals are live, but shop now before they expire. Find limited-time discounts on Shark, Sony, Tatcha and more

media:content.media:text: The blink-and-you'll-miss-it deals include brands like Breville, KitchenAid and Anker.
media:content.media:description: The blink-and-you'll-miss-it deals include brands like Breville, KitchenAid and Anker.

media:content.media:text: The blink-and-you'll-miss-it deals include brands like Breville, KitchenAid and Anker.
media:content.media:description: The blink-and-you'll-miss-it deals include brands like Breville, KitchenAid and Anker.

item.title: Shop Prime Day’s blink-and-you’ll-miss-it deals from Breville, Topicals, Old Navy and more

item.description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

media:content.media:title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft
media:content.media:description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

item.title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft

item.dc:creator: Aria Bendix
Julie Tsirkin
item.description: The Trump administration backed Bayer, the maker of Roundup, angering prominent voices in the “Make America Healthy Again” movement.

media:content.media:text: Two bottles of RoundUp next to each other
media:content.media:description: Bottles of Roundup weed killer on a shelf at a Lowe's Garden Center in Burbank, Calif., on Thursday.

item.title: ‘The decision is sickening’: MAHA leaders feel betrayed by Supreme Court ruling on Roundup weed killer

item.dc:creator: Samantha Elkins
item.description: The Tesla Model 3 crash, which killed a 76-year-old woman, comes after years of scrutiny of Tesla’s driver assistance systems.

media:content.media:credit: Harris County Constable Precinct 5 via Facebook
media:content.media:text: Tesla Crashes Through Katy House.
media:content.media:description: Sen. Richard Blumenthal, D-Conn., during a Senate Armed Services Committee hearing on April 30 in the Dirksen Senate Office Building.

item.title: Sen. Blumenthal demands Tesla be held accountable for alleged self-driving crash

item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sullivan
item.description: People are more worried about severe muscular problems when taking statins than they should be: These side effects are exceedingly rare, research published Thursday in the journal The Lancet Digital Health reaffirms.

media:content.media:text: Pill and blister pack

item.title: Serious statin side effects on muscles are extremely rare, new research confirms
